calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Ike Okwuosa, Manager for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Michael Banayos.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 19, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewart Company, and against defendant Michael Banayos as follows:

Plaintiff John Stewart Company shall recover from defendant Michael Banayos Holdover Damages in the amount of $580.68 and costs in the amount of $245.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $825.68.

Plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 387 Ellis Street, #215, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., OCT-01-2008: CINDY LEE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF DANIEL O'NEILL, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY; LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEY DEVIN S. BRENNAN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT NANCY K. COX, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES. PARTIES AGREE AND SIGN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DAY. TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

JPT JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
